text.autoconfig.numericalhud.title: Numerical HUD
text.autoconfig.numericalhud.option.anim:
Controls how the HUD values animate when they change.

DECIMAL:
Numbers count up/down with decimals.

FADE:
The number snaps instantly and the text color fades back to white.

POPUP:
A delta value (+2, -3) floats next to the module for 1 second.
text.autoconfig.numericalhud.option.text:
Controls how the module numbers are rendered.

SHADOW:
Standard text with a drop shadow and full color.

OUTLINE:
White text with a black outline, ignoring module colors.
text.autoconfig.numericalhud.option.show: When enabled, shows the effect name above the timer. When disabled, only the timer is shown, vertically centered next to the icon.
When disabled, the Armor module is hidden entirely while the player has no armor equipped.
text.autoconfig.numericalhud.option.shif: Shifts all modules 6 pixels down. Enable this if you want the modules to sit lower on screen.
